creator: sclements@mozilla.com
description:
For tabs within a splitview, we want to change the default behavior so that the address bar result default opens the URL in the split view but provide a quick action for users to switch to tab (so a reverse of current default behavior, and which flipping the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` pref to true does). 

As part of this effort, Dale has offered to support this work by making the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` behavior the default behavior when clicking on an address bar result. See bug 1996142 for more details.

Edit: After a chat with Dale, we're going to utilize the existing quickActions/behavior [gated by the secondaryAction pref](https://searchfox.org/firefox-main/source/browser/components/urlbar/content/UrlbarInput.mjs#1496) so we can get this into 149 (only for tabs within a splitview) and Dale is going to work in parallel to enable the pref by default which will ideally land in 149 but might have a longer timeline.

comments.raw_text:
For tabs within a splitview, we want to change the default behavior so that the address bar result default opens the URL in the split view but provide a quick action for users to switch to tab (so a reverse of current default behavior, and which flipping the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` pref to true does). 

As part of this effort, Dale has offered to support this work by making the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` behavior the default behavior when clicking on an address bar result. See bug 1996142 for more details.

Edit: After a chat with Dale, we're going to utilize the existing quickActions/behavior [gated by the secondaryAction pref](https://searchfox.org/firefox-main/source/browser/components/urlbar/content/UrlbarInput.mjs#1496) so we can get this into 149 (only for tabs within a splitview) and Dale is going to work in parallel to enable the pref by default which will ideally land in 149 but might have a longer timeline.

As part of this effort, Dale has offered to support this work by making the `browser.urlbar.secondaryActions.switchToTab` behavior the default behavior when clicking on an address bar result. See bug 1996142 for more details.

comments.author: jteow@mozilla.com
comments.raw_text:
Hi Sarah, we're just downgrading this to P2 just because it seems as if no one is currently assigned to it.

Is this something we on the Search are supposed to work on or is someone from your team going to work on it?
comments.text:
Hi Sarah, we're just downgrading this to P2 just because it seems as if no one is currently assigned to it.

Is this something we on the Search are supposed to work on or is someone from your team going to work on it?
comments.creator: jteow@mozilla.com

comments.raw_text:
(In reply to James Teow [:jteow] from comment #1)
> Hi Sarah, we're just downgrading this to P2 just because it seems as if no one is currently assigned to it.
> 
> Is this something we on the Search are supposed to work on or is someone from your team going to work on it?

From my perspective its a P1, though it may not get done in 148. My intention is for someone from my team to pick up as soon as they are able - we are targeting 149 for this - and so that's why I added the [fidife-splitview] tag. (We do not have a general "splitview" component so that's why I filed it here as it seemed the most appropriate place).

Since your teams whiteboard tag was added to bug 1996142, and since Dale said he'd need to do some work to support the functionality for the [secondary action pref](https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1996142#c7) , I had thought the intention was for your team to use that bug for that purpose.

comments.raw_text: After discussion with other teams, we decided to use the inactionable "chicklet" or badge but change the text to "Move Tab to Split View" and have it move the tab to the split view rather than switching to that tab.
comments.author: kcochrane@mozilla.com
comments.creator: kcochrane@mozilla.com
comments.text: After discussion with other teams, we decided to use the inactionable "chicklet" or badge but change the text to "Move Tab to Split View" and have it move the tab to the split view rather than switching to that tab.

atrif@mozilla.com
comments.raw_text:
Verified fixed with Firefox 149.0a1 (2026-01-26) on Windows 11, macOS 14 and Ubuntu 24. The selected tab from the address bar is correctly moved to Split View when selected from Firefox Suggest or the Shortcuts section. Note that I filed bug 2012399 when testing this. 

I have added a [test case](https://mozilla.testrail.io/index.php?/cases/view/3333707) for this implementation. Is there something else that we should look for here? Also, is there a preference? Kelly is on PTO, please change the ni? if needed. Thank you in advance!
comments.creator: atrif@mozilla.com
comments.text:
Verified fixed with Firefox 149.0a1 (2026-01-26) on Windows 11, macOS 14 and Ubuntu 24. The selected tab from the address bar is correctly moved to Split View when selected from Firefox Suggest or the Shortcuts section. Note that I filed bug 2012399 when testing this. 

I have added a [test case](https://mozilla.testrail.io/index.php?/cases/view/3333707) for this implementation. Is there something else that we should look for here? Also, is there a preference? Kelly is on PTO, please change the ni? if needed. Thank you in advance!
